step_by_step_reasoning: Chronological analysis of the transcript: 1. Public comments are stored on regulations.gov (ThirdParty). 2. An AWS Lambda function runs daily to ingest these comments, saving them to Amazon S3. 3. SageMaker Notebooks are used to retrieve raw data from S3, clean the markdown/special characters, and save the intermediate CSV back to S3. 4. SageMaker coordinates running Scikit-learn models (for clustering and grade level) and Flan UL2 (for sentiment analysis). 5. SageMaker calls Amazon Bedrock (Titan model) to analyze language complexity for expert designation. 6. Final aggregated results are saved back to S3 in CSV format. 7. Non-profit campaign analysts (UserCompanyAnalyst) access a Tableau dashboard (ThirdParty) which queries the results from S3 to update daily insights.

graph.name: Generative AI and ML-Powered Regulatory Comment Analysis
graph.notes: Modernized campaign reporting using a blend of Amazon Bedrock (Titan), lightweight open-source models (Flan UL2 on SageMaker), and traditional Scikit-learn clustering. Scaled to ingest up to 250,000 to 500,000 regulatory comments in a 90-day period for a small non-profit.

nodes.name: regulations.gov
nodes.notes: External government regulations portal holding public comments.

nodes.name: Daily Ingestion Lambda
nodes.notes: Triggers daily to pull new comments from regulations.gov.

nodes.name: S3 Data Store
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Stores raw comments, intermediate clean CSVs, and final model execution results.

nodes.name: SageMaker Notebooks
nodes.notes: Cleans data (removing special characters, markdown), and hosts Scikit-learn (clustering form letters/grade level) and Hugging Face Flan UL2 models (sentiment analysis).

nodes.name: Amazon Bedrock (Titan)
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Leverages Titan model to run language complexity evaluation for expert designation.

nodes.name: Tableau
nodes.notes: Business intelligence tool that displays daily refreshed dashboards.

nodes.name: Campaign Analyst
nodes.notes: Non-profit staff analyzing public campaign trends and identifying key regulatory experts.

edges.notes: SageMaker pulls raw comments for pre-processing.
Writes cleaned CSV back to S3.
Sends comments to Bedrock Titan for expert identification.
Saves combined ML analysis results as CSV in S3.
Analyst accesses the Tableau reporting dashboard.
Queries the daily refreshed CSV datasets from S3.
Returns structured ML insights to Tableau.
Renders campaign insights, support/opposition trends, and expert highlights.
